1262.reason: [The original condition lacks bounds checking for pos+2, which can cause IndexOutOfBoundsException. Also, the logic for distinguishing Decl from FuncDef/MainFuncDef is incorrect because a VarDecl starts with 'int'/'char', not necessarily followed by '(' at pos+2.]

1265.reason: [The condition lacks bounds checking and incorrectly assumes that any non-main function has its name at pos+1. This will fail when there are no functions before main or when parsing reaches EOF.]
